title: loadbanger
lb
description: bang messages at loading or when activated

messages.description: bang messages at loading or when activated

body: [loadbanger] (or [lb]) sends "bangs" (from right to left) when loading the patch and also sends bangs when receiving any message or clicked on. The number of outputs is defined by the argument (1 by default). [lb] can also be useful for dynamic patching (for creating inlets/outlets) in init mode.
